## [00:00 - 03:00]

Alright, so by now you know all the different flows. Let's talk about how you can segment some of your VIP customers to further extract more revenue and this all happens through personalization. So whether that's the pictures you show, the text that you use, the way that you speak to people, all these things help drive home the sale, especially with your best customers or your VIP customers. So I'm going to show you an example right now. This is what the brand, the Chivry, who is a client and one thing that we figured out, so I guess a quick backstory is they have some subscribers on a Chivbox Flow and these people pay a monthly membership to get access to not only product but they get access to priority service as well as they get an ongoing 20% discount whereas everyone else in their store and it gets 10%, 15% tops or they get free shipping. So what we figured out through reading customer support tickets was that the Chivbox subscribers didn't want to receive the same content and the same discounts that everyone else is receiving so we ended up breaking up these two flows. So on my screen right now you can see the current and kind of the original abandoned checkout flow which we went through earlier and again the data here and the numbers are great. So 41% open rate and 11% click through rate, almost a 6% poised order. They did $7,000 on this one email alone and basically what we did here is we said anyone that's a Chivbox subscriber do not send them this email, send them instead a different email. So when you look at this group this is the same pretty much structure and format but you can see the conversion rate when you're speaking directly to who you know as your best customers. So this open rate is 58%, the click through is almost 30% and the poised order rate is twice as high as the other one. So again by splitting the two up and being more personalized and being more direct in how we communicate with these subscribers the better it's performing. Now I want to show you the content for this Chivbox kind of subscriber only email and again you can kind of see the subtle differences that we use to communicate and that we really know our subscribers. So again this kind of addresses them letting them know that they should head back and check out and calling out the fact that hey we know you're a Chivbox subscriber so because you are you're getting 20% off but hey this code is only good for the next 48 hours. So in the code itself you can see right now it just shows a preview but when it's actually a live code that the customer will get it will say Chivbox subscriber and then it will have a string of numbers or digits. So everything here is pretty subtle but it's helping communicate to people that we really value that hey we know who you are here's your extra discount and again that stem from really kind of getting feedback from our customers through support tickets knowing that they want kind of separate content and as such we've been able to increase the conversion rate across the entire series.

## [03:00 - 04:20]

So again email 2 on the VIP side has a 5.4% conversion where the email 2 on the other one has a 2.7 so again almost twice as effective when segmented and then lastly this email at the very bottom has a 15% poised order rate which is huge compared to the 1.3% poised order rate. Again in summary now that you know all the content don't be afraid to kind of split up content depending on who your customer is if they're someone that's new it's okay to send them the same content that you're sending kind of standard into everyone else but if they're a really great customer and you kind of go above and beyond for them do that in the same email and you'll see the the conversion rate really skyrocket. While you might not have a subscription flow like the Chivory does think about ways that you can segment and figure out who your VIPs are whether that's off of the number of orders they've placed the total value of the revenue and figure out how you can send them specific content whether it be in campaigns or in these flows that we've discussed whether that be the browse abandonment maybe it's a special discount added just communicate with them a little bit differently than you communicate with everyone else because when you take care of them you know they're going to take care of you so make sure to go get started on this right now just list a couple ideas and see which one makes sense and start building some content.
